nasb.text: You have also delivered me from the contentions of my people; You have kept me as head of the nations; A people whom I have not known serve me.

esv.text: “You delivered me from strife with my people; you kept me as the head of the nations; people whom I had not known served me.

cnv.text: 你救我脫離了我民的爭競， 你立我作列國的元首； 我不認識的人民要服事我。

ccb.text: 你救我脱离我百姓的攻击， 让我成为列国的元首， 素不相识的民族也归顺我。
